headline: Super Micro Computer Targets Scalable AI Growth With Modular Data Center Push
summary: Super Micro Computer (NasdaqGS:SMCI) has partnered with SK Telecom and Schneider Electric to deliver prefabricated modular AI data centers. The collaboration focuses on ready-to-deploy modules that combine AI servers, power, and cooling to speed up rollout and manage upfront costs. The announcement highlights Supermicro’s push to supply AI infrastructure that can be scaled more easily by enterprise and telecom customers. Super Micro Computer, trading at $32.24, sits at the center of growing...
